trigger: Bryan requested one coherent follow-up batch to turn the production-surface cleanup ending at commit 82dd90b into a pilot/deploy readiness gate.
scope: Add predeploy, generated-output drift, alpha/account deployment, stakeholder option lifecycle, custom-domain cutover, and live Cloudflare token decision gates without repeating the prior production-surface classification campaign.
changes: Added docs/production-predeploy-checklist.md as the pilot/deploy readiness gate.
Added scripts/check-generated-output-drift.mjs and wired check:generated-output-drift into package.json and the aggregate check rail.
Added docs/alpha-account-deployment-decision.md with keep-unlinked, gate, and remove options for Bryan.
Added docs/stakeholder-option-lifecycle.md with retain, retire, and promote workflows.
Added docs/custom-domain-cutover-checklist.md with project mapping, DNS/CNAME, TLS, health, smoke, and rollback steps.
Updated human decisions, production-surface docs, README, backend setup, MVP catalog, handoff ledger, and run log with the predeploy gate and live-token blocker.

validation.summary: Production surface leak check passed: 87 production text surfaces scanned.
Production route inventory is up to date.
Public companion and stakeholder review outputs match deterministic source expectations.
Aggregate check passed, including production surfaces, route inventory, generated-output drift, site options, Cloudflare static checks, 115 tests, and typecheck.
Static Wrangler/D1 verification passed; live Pages/D1 verification was blocked because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set.

generated_output.notes: No generated output was rebuilt; the new drift checker compared committed output against deterministic source expectations.

blockers: Bryan must choose final custom-domain mapping.
Bryan must choose alpha/account deployment policy before pilot.
Bryan must choose stakeholder option retain, retire, or promote lifecycle before final production positioning.
next_actions: Bryan chooses the alpha/account deployment option from docs/alpha-account-deployment-decision.md.
Bryan chooses stakeholder option retain, retire, or promote workflow from docs/stakeholder-option-lifecycle.md.
Bryan chooses final custom-domain mapping from docs/custom-domain-cutover-checklist.md.
Provide CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN when ready to run check:cloudflare:live.
self_improvement: Generated-output drift is now a first-class check in the aggregate validation rail.
